results.title: Claude + Figma MCP — Updated Setup for Designers
results.reason: The most comprehensive 'updated' tutorial specifically for designers, addressing common setup hurdles and recent interface changes.

results.title: Figma to Webflow using Claude MCP (EASY!)
results.reason: Flux Academy provides a highly accessible, workflow-oriented guide that simplifies the complex Figma-to-Webflow bridge for beginners.

Move data between design and building tools

results.title: Connect Claude to Figma with MCP
results.reason: Excellent beginner resource that defines terms like 'Claude Code' vs 'Sonnet' and uses chapters to help users navigate the setup process.
summary: Link your AI chat to your Figma account

results.title: Figma MCP AI Course for Beginners (Design to Code with Context)
results.reason: Structured specifically as a 'course for beginners,' making it the most pedagogically sound starting point for new users.

results.title: Figma MCP + Cursor — Full Tutorial
